---
title: "3_Black_spruce_introgression"
author: "Anoob Prakash"
date: '2023-03-25'
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    theme: cosmo  
    number_sections: false
    toc: false
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{css zoom-lib-src, echo = FALSE}
script src = "https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.4.1/jquery.min.js"
```

```{js zoom-jquery, echo = FALSE}
 $(document).ready(function() {
    $('body').prepend('<div class=\"zoomDiv\"><img src=\"\" class=\"zoomImg\"></div>');
    // onClick function for all plots (img's)
    $('img:not(.zoomImg)').click(function() {
      $('.zoomImg').attr('src', $(this).attr('src')).css({width: '100%'});
      $('.zoomDiv').css({opacity: '1', width: 'auto', border: '1px solid white', borderRadius: '5px', position: 'fixed', top: '50%', left: '50%', marginRight: '-50%', transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', boxShadow: '0px 0px 50px #888888', zIndex: '50', overflow: 'auto', maxHeight: '100%'});
    });
    // onClick function for zoomImg
    $('img.zoomImg').click(function() {
      $('.zoomDiv').css({opacity: '0', width: '0%'}); 
    });
  });
```

```{r}
setwd("Z:/Anoob/Polygenic_Adaptation/ANALYSIS")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
require(tidyverse)
require(kableExtra)
require(formattable)
require(lmerTest)
require(tidyverse)
require(sjPlot)
require(FactoMineR)
require(factoextra)
```

## Data  
```{r}
# incorporate ancestry score
# Get ID and pop info for each individual
pop<-read.table("filtering_the_snps_across_REGION/REGIONS/324RSfam_18BSfam_bam_VACC.list")
pop$Family <- str_replace_all(pop$V1,"/netfiles02/kellrlab/datashare/Spruce/exome_capture/WES_mapping/Mapping_WES/ref_Pmariana/BWA/Prubens/NSF/","")
pop$Family <- str_replace_all(pop$Family,"/netfiles02/kellrlab/datashare/Spruce/exome_capture/WES_mapping/Mapping_WES/ref_Pmariana/BWA/Pmariana/","")

pop$Family <- str_replace_all(pop$Family,".sorted.rmdup.bam","")
pop <- pop$Family
dataset <- read.table("filtering_the_snps_across_REGION/admix/Full_Sampling_intersect_poly_updated_with_BS_samples_PCA_admix_K2.admix.2.Q")
colnames(dataset) <- c("q1","q2")

admix.id = as.data.frame(cbind(pop, dataset))
names(admix.id) <- c("Family","q1","q2")

# Meta data
Meta <- read.table("../../BlackSpruce/Info_samples_all.txt", sep="\t",header=T)

# add coordinates 
dataset <- merge(admix.id,Meta[,c("Family","Region","State","Longitude","Latitude")])

```

## All regions
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.dim = c(40, 10)}
# combine RS and BS samples
data2 <- dataset[,c("Family","Region","Latitude","Longitude","State","q1","q2")]
# BS_data <- BS_data[,c("Family","Region","Latitude","Longitude","State","q1","q2")]
# data2 <- rbind(data2,BS_data)


# plot per region
data2 <- gather(data2, pq, value, q1:q2, factor_key=TRUE)

data2$Region <- factor(data2$Region, levels = c("BS","E", "M", "C"),
                                     labels = c("BS","Edge", "Margin", "Core"))
```

```{r}
# data exported for further analysis
# saveRDS(data2, "../TraitData/family_ancestry_score")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.dim = c(40, 10)}
require(forcats)

# Grouped (10h 40w)
ggplot(data2, aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x="Family") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+ # removes the blank spaces between data and titles
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) 

# Grouped (10h 40w) - updated figure - July 2025
data2$Population <- str_extract(data2$Family, "^[^_]+")

ggplot(data2, aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width = 1) + 
  labs(x="Family", y="Genomic Proportions") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#EE0000","black")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+ # removes the blank spaces between data and titles
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        # axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15, margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

# ggsave("./figures/paper_figures/Figure2B.png", width = 4000, height = 900, units = "px", type = "cairo")
# 
# ggsave("./figures/paper_figures/Figure2B-1.pdf", width = 35, height = 8,dpi=300,
#        units = "cm")
```

## Core
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.dim = c(20, 10)}
# Core (10h 20w pdf; 2040w 788h jpg)
ggplot(data2[data2$Region=="Core",], aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x="Family") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) 
```


```{r echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE, fig.dim = c(20, 10)}

# Testing (10h 20w)
ggplot(data2[data2$Region=="Core",], aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x="Family") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) 
```

## Margin
```{r echo=FALSE}
# Margin (10h 15w df; 1285w 788h jpg)
ggplot(data2[data2$Region=="Margin",], aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x="Family") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) 
```

## Edge
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.dim = c(20, 10)}
# Edge (10h 20w pdf; 2068w 788h jpg)
ggplot(data2[data2$Region=="Edge",], aes(fill=pq, y=value, x=fct_reorder(Family, Latitude))) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
  labs(x="Family") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  facet_grid(.~Region,space = "free_x", scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        plot.margin = margin(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, unit = "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 270, face = "bold"),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 30),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 0.5, b = 0.5, unit = "cm")),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()) 

```
